text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day off from our relentless preparation for
the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to pass by the training track and see
Special Week doing some independent training
with a friend.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I did it... A personal best!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Pant... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Seiun Sky, one of Special Week's classmates.
She's a calm and gentle Umamusume who can be
very incisive at times.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, I got toasted out there. You've really
improved, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You haven't just gotten faster. You've gotten
better at racing in general.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Coming from a tactician like you, that's a
real honor!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I think running in the Kisaragi Sho was a great
help. Lately, it feels like I've finally started to
understand how to really run!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I can see the difference. Your form is really
shaping up as you get ready for the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Oh well. I guess I can't just sit around and do
nothing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it, Sei?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking that I've gotta give it my all
too.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, thanks for running with me today. See ya
around!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay! See you in class!
choice_data_list: Hey, Spe! That was some nice running.
Hey, Spe! That was some nice running.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, hey Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I buy Special Week a drink to reward her for the
extra training she put in.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp... Ahhh! Talk about hitting the spot!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
No. I mean, not just for the juice... but also for
training me every day.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I did good in the Kisaragi Sho, and I really think
I've improved a lot!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'd been running on my own out in the country
until I got here, so I didn't have much proper
experience. Made me really nervous a lot...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I've gained so much confidence because of
what you've been teaching me every day!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Your spirits are as lofty as the clouds
above, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Symboli Rudolf, the president of the Tracen
Academy student council and an extremely
talented Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, P-president! Uhhh, hi!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There is no need for such formalities. My
apologies for interrupting your sprightly chat.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I just had to come over here and offer the both of
you my praise.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Special Week's meteoric rise as of late has
been quite impressive.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I believe this to be due to her constant efforts, as
well as the persistent encouragement that you
give her as her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You're exactly right!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When I'm surrounded by the pack with my way
forward blocked and I've got no stamina left... I
imagine Trainer's face...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Then my legs fill right back up with energy again!
I can keep on pushing because I know I'm not
alone!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... A runner dashing across the turf towards
glory, and a trainer to act as her pillar of support.
Truly, an ideal pairing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In other matters, I hear that your next goal is the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's a race I've definitely gotta to win if I
wanna be the top Umamusume in all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I see. That is an excellent goal. Special Week, I
hope that you...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And your trainer both come out of that race
triumphant.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You're even wishing Trainer well?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They say that becoming the trainer of a Derby
champion is more difficult a task than becoming
the leader of a nation.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you wish to repay your trainer for all of his trust
and devotion, then...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you wish to repay your trainer for all of her
trust and devotion, then...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There is no place more suitable than the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the day becomes evening, we part ways with
Symboli Rudolf, and I see Special Week back to
her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, nothing! Nope, nothing to see here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for walking me back to my dorm! I'll see
ya tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I watch as she trods away, consumed in thought.
